decoder_heading: How do we protect your information?

heading_content_part: How do we protect your information?

decoder_heading: We have implemented a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.
ident_heading: We have implemented a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.
heading_content_part: We have implemented a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.For local printing over Wi-Fi, Bluetooth or USB you information never leaves the perimeters of your network or device. For remote printing the information is transmitted over the Internet via Secure Socket Layer (SSL) technology and further encrypted with AES 264 technology. To provide guaranteed delivery mechanism such information can be temporarily stored on our servers (cached) until the target printer becomes available or timeout takes place.

decoder_heading: We have implemented a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.
ident_heading: We have implemented a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.
heading_content_part: For order processing some information is collected by Payment Gateway Providers. After a transaction, your private information (credit cards, etc.) will not be stored on our servers.

decoder_heading: Do we disclose any information to outside parties?

heading_content_part: Do we disclose any information to outside parties?

decoder_heading: Absolutely not.
ident_heading: Absolutely not.
heading_content_part: Absolutely not. We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your personally identifiable information. This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our services or servicing you, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential. We may only provide with non-personally identifiable information such as usage statistics, analytics, crash reports, etc.
